subject: rfkill: Fix incorrect check to avoid NULL pointer dereference
notes: Classic missing-check: pointer parameter rfkill is dereferenced via `&rfkill->dev` BEFORE the `BUG_ON(!rfkill)` guard two lines below. Final query detects the buggy variant exclusively and is silent on the fixed variant. All 4 predicates passed validation on first try; final query compiled+oracle-passed on first iteration.
